span.p:
Always-load references
guardrails + topology + context + ledger + learning

color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Repo state and plan pointer
match artifact reality?

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STALL
recover artifacts, fix resumption pointer,
or recover cancelled workers

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Resolve entry phase from plan.yaml + findings.yaml

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Prepare shared context
refresh graph, write slices,
write learning-context.yaml

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Dispatch scout batch
Typing / Ownership / ControlFlow / Graph

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: High, Medium, or clear seam family?

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 0 barrier
verify four scout artifacts,
parse-check shape, update ledger + scorecard

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gilfoyle Code Review God Mode
independent calibration pass

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Verify net-new findings against live source
promote High/Critical, write deep-review deltas
and scout coverage patch when needed

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 1 grading
merge scout output and run registry/facade micro-checks

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Write compact grading artifact
record suppressed_highs rationale

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 2 persist plan
update findings.yaml + plan.yaml
sync resumption_pointer

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 3 micro-swarm
3-6 named probes for one ambiguity cluster

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 4 decide
dedup, normalize, record decisions,
shape disjoint builder waves

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 5 wave entry
write wave start-audit + wave plan

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Wave barrier
one summary artifact per builder,
recover missing or cancelled workers

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pre-validation checks
narrow gate, anti-pattern grep,
sync ledger + scorecard + plan

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Phase 6 Gatekeeper
full or path-filtered gate

span.p:
Persist gate evidence in .mutl3y-gate
write gate-escape candidate when narrow passed
but full gate failed

color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Phase 7 close findings
collect workflow-learning, coverage,
and gate-escape artifacts

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Run update_learning_memory.py compile
refresh lessons, history, rollup, digest

span.p: Rotate focus axis and start next cycle

span.p:
Gilfoyle Code Review God Mode
final unconstrained sign-off pass
